I was selling now for me to sell $197 product. I've got to be really good at writing copy or writing a sales video or something because $197 is a lot of money. You have to be really really good to sell somebody something at that price and And so we start, you know hire copywriters and do a whole bunch of really complicated things and then we come back here and we'd send traffic to go and buy that product and On average if the copy was really good if we send a hundred visitors to website We might convert 1% of the people and the reality was that 1% that's actually probably pretty high On a $200 product it rarely was was 1% if it was 1% we usually be pretty excited But just for numbers sake let's just say 1% okay, so we sent a hundred visitors to buy a product for $197 It means we made $197, right? And so if I was spending a dollar for every visitor I sent to the site I was making back, you know, so I said a hundred visitors spent $100 I made $97 profit and that was kind of what we used to do with people The problem is sometimes it would take us two or three or four or five dollars to send a visitor here Okay, or sometimes it would convert less than 1% or a lot of different things But the reality is this type of a funnel makes it really hard to To break even into to make profit in most markets you're in okay So that's when we came back and we kind of took a step back And that's when we started creating these free plus shipping offers where we would create a free CD or free mp3 player a free book or a free t-shirt or You know Some of my friends and free knives, you know a lot of different things you can do but a free offer They take these same 100 people and you send them to a to a free offer because it's free Usually we get our conversion rate a lot higher. I just know it works And so what we found is because people said yes right here Their likelihood to say yes the next thing was way higher in fact usually on average where anywhere from from 15 to 30% Of people will take the next product Okay, is that crazy 15 to 30% of people so if you look at the numbers here We send the exact same hundred visitors to a page 8% of them buy so I got eight new eight new customers Eight new buyers to join my you know my my list which is pretty cool And then from that 25% of those eight end up buying which means 25% of eight means we sold what two of them Yeah, cuz one of the two yeah, so two of them so I made $394 so you made twice as much money Okay, plus you got eight buyers to join your list Okay, do you see the power behind that? Hey people will pay more money for the exact same content packaged in a different way Can they say that again people will spend more money for the exact same content? Package in a different way Okay, so let me explain what I mean When I first got in this business every single person that I every event I went to every tell a seminar I was listening to this is before webinars were around But they'd always talk about this book called thinking girl rich now I was say hey who here's red thinking girl rich and I had never read it. This book's gonna change my life So I got the book put on my my you know on next to my bed and I was gonna read it and I I was gonna read it and I was gonna read it and guess what I never I never read it and You know fast forward a year later I still hadn't read the book and people kept talking about kept talking about it And one day I was listening to one of my mentors Mark Joyner and he brought it up again He said if you haven't read thinking girl rich you need to go read it I thought you know what I've got to read this book I'm never gonna do it and so I went on eBay that night and I started searching for thinking girl rich Just to see if there's a an easier or a better way for me to to consume the product and sure enough I found CDs of thinking girl rich on eBay and the CDs at the time the guy was selling them for a hundred dollars Okay, ten times the price of the book. So I bought the CDs CDs came to my house I put them in my CD player as I was driving around town going to school and back and and What was cool is that in about two weeks period time? I had read the book thinking girl rich Okay, I didn't read it the way that that most people read reading a book by listening on CD And I was able to consume it. I learned it and and from that I was able to get to get the value I needed out of the book. Okay, now let me ask you a question Was there any difference between the book thinking girl rich and the audio CD thinking girl rich? No, they they were exactly worth for word. It wasn't even wasn't even a little deviation Okay, always was a dude reading the book into a microphone And then he put it on CDs and he sold it to me for ten times as much money Okay, and that's the power of this you guys you have to understand that your content again If you package it different ways can be worth so much more money Okay, something you put on a free CD is only worth, you know like this thing this thing right here This free CD was only worth what do we charge people? It's a better way to consume this product for an extra hundred dollars I'll throw this in the package as well Just click the button down below and we'll add this to your order if somebody was to that to me I would have bought it Okay, now obviously for me it took me a little while because I had this pain associated with me not reading it But if you if you structure the sales process, right? About 20 percent of people pretty consistently anywhere again 15 to 30 percent about 20 25 percent of people will buy this next thing from you Because they're they're a buyer in heat. They're excited by about the topic at the time Okay, here's a really inappropriate example that probably shouldn't share on a live webinar But if you guys have ever heard the example of a porcupine in heat So porcupines Supposedly I've never actually read the research on this but I heard it one time a porcupine is only in heat one day a year Okay, so for 364 days they don't mate. They don't do anything. They're just they're fine For one day a year when a porcupine is in heat they have to go and that's when they when they do their duty and they'll go and and and Have porcupine love with I don't know 10 20 30 porcupines at once right because they're porcupine heat in the next day They're done. They're they're no longer Excited about the topic anymore. Okay now buyers are the exact same way for example about a year ago I took my team bowling and I love bowling is probably my third favorite sport and We're bowling and I did pretty good, but I lost to this one guy and His Mike Loverage and it still to the state bothers me that that he beat me because first off I feel like I'm better than him, but he beat me and he just would not let it down and he was just Just making fun of me and anyway as a very competitive person that was driving me crazy and that night I went home and I was a porcupine in heat. I was so mad about losing. I needed I had so much pain I wanted to figure out how to solve this problem So I went online and I started looking for bowling balls and bowling shoes and bowling risk guards and and whole bunch of stuff and that night I spent hundreds of dollars on bowling stuff Okay, and because I was a porcupine heat and guess what the next day I got you know the stuff all got shipped to me at that point. I was out of heat I didn't in fact I don't think I've been bowling since that since that day, but for that little time I had enough pain as a porcupine in heat same things can happen for you guys Okay, you're driving traffic and somebody let's say you're in the dating market Okay, and someone just got dumped by their girlfriend and they come across to your offer talking about how the year show I'm how to get a new girlfriend this weekend. They're a porcupine in heat They're gonna buy this and the next thing and the next thing then they're gonna go somebody else's side by their thing And they're gonna buy a bunch of stuff really quick to try to resolve their pain But guess what next week? They got a girlfriend and at that point They don't need your stuff anymore and if you waited a week or a month or a year to sell it to him It's too late. They've already they've already Had their had their itched scratched Okay, and the weight loss space same thing somebody's gonna come to your site because that morning they felt fat They felt overweight for whatever reason they saw your ad they clicked on it boom boom boom their porcupine in heat Okay, there are a lot of pain and they need a solution right now Okay, make money thing. I just lost my job or somebody I hate my boss today. My boss just yelled at me today I'm going home that night. I'm a porcupine. He I'm buying how to make money on the internet stuff Okay, that's how this whole world works buyers all follow the same pattern. Okay, so that's why it's important to understand That's kind of how it how it works. Okay? Okay, if you don't have anything yet What I'd recommend doing for most of you guys is the invisible funnel because it's gonna be the easiest and the best and the best way to to go about this first time, okay Because the nice thing is you don't have to go and create a whole product and all this editing stuff You can just do a webinar just like this Okay, and then you can just record the webinar and you're done So I'm gonna kind of show you walking through really quick how this whole thing works Okay, the first thing if you are doing invisible funnel what you got to do is take your system You created module number one and you're just gonna turn to PowerPoints just like this right like the PowerPoints I'm showing you guys. Okay, you notice nothing fancy about them. They're simple. They just give me talking points I can talk through them. You don't want to put your text everything you're gonna say on PowerPoints because it becomes super boring You just want a couple bullet points to kind of lead you and guide you through what you want to talk about Okay, so you can do it with PowerPoint if you're a PC guy or gal if you're in a Mac Do it in keynote and create your PowerPoint. Okay now if you don't know how to record it There's two ways to do it first off if you want you can do a webinar live like this in fact One of our students names Haley. She's in the dog training niche and she just recorded hers a little while ago And so what she did is that she went and she had like five or six friends are interested in her train the dog Anyway, she said well, I'm gonna do this webinar It's gonna be about three or four hours long and I want you to come on this webinar and just critique me afterwards because I'm you know You get free training for me But I just want to see if it's good and if it's exciting and engaging and so she went to go to webinar She created an account. I think you get a free trial She set up her thing. She invited all her friends to it and she and she did the webinar once and she just recorded it Now the company we use record our webinars. It's called webinar wizards calm the guy Eli owns it. He's awesome He you just tell him hey, I'm gonna record this and it's maybe a hundred bucks or so I can't remember exactly how much it cost and he clicks record records the whole thing when it's done He sends you the video. Yeah, so Haley did that the first time she recorded it for her friends She we are she didn't lie for her friends and she recorded it and her friends gave her good feedback Some said, you know, this part was kind of boring this part was awesome I wish you would talk more about this and she got some really good feedback from her friends and people who are interested in what she Was talking about and then she went back the second time Recorded it again and this time was able to nail it the first time and get the perfect one Okay, so for a lot of you guys, this would be the route I would go is during this next week. I would pick a date or a time Let's say it's this Friday or Saturday and say look I'm gonna record a webinar Get an account and go to webinar calm again there. I think they have a trial there Set it up and then go invite five or ten or fifteen people that you know to come who'd be interested in listening in and giving you some Constructive criticism then make your your PowerPoints teaching your system get on and then just start teaching Okay, and the first time I don't even know if I record the first time unless you want to kind of be able to watch it back yourself And just see how you did but nice thing about recording it live with people there is You know when you when you're doing it the not live way They'll play about here in a second you have a tendency to like if you screw up to like want to stop and start over Whereas when you're going live, you're kind of just tossed out there and you just got to go with it, right? and so it's nice because You know force you to do it plus The reality is is that most products if they're created this way are way more engaging for example I While ago I bought a product from Brian Tracy and I was listening to him and he was like the most charismatic speaker He was speaking in front of an audience on the thing You can hear the audience laughing and you heard him mess up and you heard all this stuff But I was like I was like engaged with this guy He was so exciting and and passionate and so I went I bought every Brian Tracy thing I could find next when I put in It was a product he'd created in a studio in front of a microphone He clicked record and started going and I tell you what it was like the most boring product I'd ever listened to in my entire life And I never listened to another Brian Tracy product since then because that second one was so born because it was him in front of a Mike being perfect. Okay. Now him live being himself was amazing I think most of you guys is gonna be the exact same thing Okay So what you guys to do is I want you guys to go and and do it live get some people on there That way you can just fill it out record it if you want or not either way just to do it once We get their feedback and then you come back and the second time You'll always do it better the second time because you've kind of cut your teeth on it You've messed up you you but you push through it once now you can come back and do it again and record the second time Okay, so that's the first thing now if you don't want to do it live if you're really intimidated by that or whatever Then you can go back and you can use Camtasia or screen flow Camtasia records this your screen right now I'm recording this video with Camtasia as I'm doing this live And it makes a little video and when it's done you click you click stop and then you get a video file You can edit it you can chop off the beginnings the end you can go through and edit everything But it's awesome. Okay, it's a little expensive But I would say outside of the auto responder I would say Camtasia is probably made internet marketers more money than any other product ever created. Okay, so it's worth it Okay, your auto responder and Camtasia are two products that are definitely worth their weight in gold I couldn't live without it. So Okay, uh, but that's that's why my talks are interesting because I'm always live and I'm talking and having fun and I'm passionate, right? All right now some of you guys if you're like, you know, I invisible funnel is kind of cool But I just want to sell a product. I just want to sell a $300 product straight up or $100 product straight up I just want to create an information product. That's fine as well Do but basically do the same thing you go when you create PowerPoint slides you record it and And there you go In fact, when I first got in this business one of my He he's a friend in a mentor right now, but he actually married my second aunt. So I knew when I was a little kid His name is David Fry and he it's kind of funny when I was a little kid He was he was dating my aunt my second aunt So I used to see with my grandparents house when we were playing ping-pong every Christmas time And then they didn't get married and he moved and I never saw him for probably 15 years And then one day I was working online doing my little business. I got an email from a guy And he was like he was like, hey, are you Ross and Marty son? I'm like, yeah, who are you? He said I'm David Fry I'm Ingrid's I'm Ingrid's husband. He's like, do you remember me? I used to I used to play tennis with you at Christmas time when you were a little kid I was like, yes, I do remember you. How weird is that? I was like, how'd you get my email? I said, well, I've been watching your websites He's like I do the same thing you do and he showed me his websites And I was so excited because at that point in my life my mom my mom always thought I was like unemployed or something and She always asked me so when are you getting a job Russell? You graduate from college now. It's time to get a job And I'm like mom. I'm selling stuff online. Leave me alone This is like this is a real thing, but she never believed me and I remember after After David had had had basically I found he was doing the same thing as me. I called my mom I said remember David Fry. He does the exact same thing that I do and she's like, oh, well, he's really wealthy Okay, you can do that and that was like the first time in my life that that what I did is live for a career Was like a legitimate thing to my mom anyway long story the only the only Reason why I tell you that is because after I met David We were just talking about all different things we tried to do online and he told me about he created this bulldog training product And he said that he knew nothing about bulldogs. He didn't have one but he saw it was a good market He did the market research like we showed you guys on module number one So went out there and he bought three different bulldog training products He found some guy on it wasn't Odess at the time I think it was elance.com and he he said he hired a rider saying I need to I need to create a PowerPoint slide teaching how to train a bulldog and so he sent this this writer these three bulldog books He said I want you to read all three of these books and from that create a system Just like the system outline thing we're talking about He said create a system for how to train a bulldog and I want you to turn that system into like a 50 slide PowerPoint slide on on how to train it So the guy went did all the research wrote the PowerPoint slide sent him back to David David then took the PowerPoint slides open up Camtasia and record himself teaching the slides And turn that into a I think a forty seven dollar product something like that And went on to sell over ten thousand copies of his how to train a bulldog product. Okay, and so That's kind of that that's the power of this stuff you guys like you can create products so quickly when you start understanding that It all comes down to this process I've been taking guys through since module number one if you find a hot market you find out what they want you create your system Outline them from that boom you create front-end products upsells back-end products coaching programs everything else from it Okay, so you want to create information product That's a great way the other way to create information product which is sometimes faster and less polished But has high perceived value and this is the way I created my very first my first information product is Is put on a seminar? Okay, so let's say you teach people how to train dogs and you don't you know You don't want to do invisible fun We want to have a dog training program call a bunch of your friends and say hey this weekend I am gonna be I'm gonna be training and I'm gonna teach you someone how to train it I'm teach you guys how to train a dog It's gonna be four hours long I'm gonna go through the whole entire process and we're gonna record it But if you want to come to it come hang out and invite five or ten of your friends over get a video camera and record yourself teaching them how to do something for For for two days or for a day and those videos can become your home study course Okay, we're in the baby sign language niche and we just did that with one of with our guru She just read a Baby sign language class down in Salt Lake we recorded it and now that is the the upsell for the per product Let's see one of our events I told somebody this as names Cameras name actually anyway.
